document.title: TEST REPORT
authorityOrJurisdiction: SGS Korea Co., Ltd. Dongtan Laboratory

sourceSummary.oneLine: SGS Korea Co., Ltd. Dongtan Laboratory compression test report for H&abyz Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector model B1717MCW.
keyPoints: The test was conducted as requested by the client according to the test specification presented by the client.
The sample was an unpackaged operating Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector, model B1717MCW, rated DC 15 V, 6 A.
Compression testing included 100 kgf for 10 s on local active areas, 200 kgf for 10 s on the center area, and 400 kgf for 60 s over the full area.
Visual inspection results reported no screw loosening, no deformation or crack, and no separation check.
Performance check data was provided by the applicant, and SGS Korea Co., Ltd. Dongtan Laboratory stated it has no responsibility for that data.

reviewFlags.reason: No recognized external regulatory standard is identified; the standard or method is stated only as 'Request of client'.
Authority is a testing laboratory rather than a regulatory authority.
Serial number is listed as '-' and is not available.
Annex performance check content appears image-based with limited extracted detail, and responsibility for performance check data is disclaimed by SGS Korea Co., Ltd. Dongtan Laboratory.
